---
title: "\'Real Childhood- My Play Times, A\'"
---

## \'Real Childhood- My Play Times, A\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1892
**Genre:** Non-fiction, reminiscences
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 2:8 (October 1892) 204-10

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
